name: Market Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Zucchini or Yellow squash, sliced 1/4 inch thick
1 cup Cheddar cheese, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large bowl, stir together all salad ingredients except cheese.
3. Stir in hot macaroni.
4. Refrigerate for 10 minutes.
5. Stir in cheese.
6. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, stir together all dressing ingredients except parmesan cheese.
7. Pour dressing over salad and toss to coat.
8. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Yield: 6 servings
